title: Egyptian Veggie Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful vegetarian stir fry recipe inspired by Egyptian cuisine, using yogurt as a creamy sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, mix yogurt, sour cream, cumin powder, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour the yogurt sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
7. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
8. Serve over rice or with pita bread for a filling meal.
